query:
-- First, let's see all documents with their IDs and fileUrls
SELECT id, title, 
  CASE WHEN fileUrl IS NOT NULL AND fileUrl != '' THEN 'HAS_URL' ELSE 'NO_URL' END as has_url
FROM secure_documents 
ORDER BY title, id;
command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway03.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user nC6sHo9eqXDn4Lp.root --database SPWUc63a3tjYuzCxiuEomB --execute -- First, let's see all documents with their IDs and fileUrls
SELECT id, title, 
  CASE WHEN fileUrl IS NOT NULL AND fileUrl != '' THEN 'HAS_URL' ELSE 'NO_URL' END as has_url
FROM secure_documents 
ORDER BY title, id;
